notes: Jaguar US is mid-transition to EV-only. MY26 lineup is F-PACE only (final ICE model year; last F-PACE built at Solihull on 2025-12-19). Consumer-site Specifications page returns 'information unavailable' for F-PACE; Phase 1 sourced image URLs primarily from the JLR media CDN (media.production.jlrms.com). The jaguar.com/en-us 'All Models' tile listing still shows stale tiles for I-PACE/E-PACE/F-TYPE/XF but only F-PACE is bookable. media.jaguar.com is the JLR press subdomain.
